ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "roll_number" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the student is enrolled in */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., I, II, III, IV) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., ECE, CSE) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the branch */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the branch's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch offering the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Instructor's office hours */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  "midterm_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the midterm exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "class_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "class_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "class_location" TEXT /* Location of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_name FOREIGN KEY ("user_name") REFERENCES students ("full_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_name FOREIGN KEY ("user_name") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., attendance, grades) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* User who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
